description_long: This is a roughly hewn, dark gray stone with an irregular, wedge-like shape and a rugged, natural surface. The stone features a prominent, hand-painted white label with black alphanumeric markings on one of its broader faces, suggesting it may be cataloged or used for identification in an urban or research context. Its surface is uneven, with visible textural variations, small chips, and subtle color mottling, indicating it has not been polished or artificially shaped. The edges are jagged and asymmetrical, with one side tapering to a thinner profile, while the opposite side is broader and more block-like. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or openings, and its coloration ranges from charcoal to lighter gray streaks. Overall, it resembles a piece of construction or landscaping material, possibly used as a barrier or marker in urban environments.
description: A rugged, dark gray stone with an irregular wedge shape, rough surface, and a white painted label with black writing. Its jagged edges and dense appearance suggest use as a barrier or marker.
description_view_0: The stone appears very thin from this angle, showing its narrowest edge and a glimpse of the white label running vertically.
description_view_1: This view reveals the broadest, rough face of the stone, highlighting its uneven surface and blocky profile.
description_view_2: The stone is again seen from a thin edge, with less visibility of the label and more focus on the stone's tapering shape.
description_view_3: The main face with the white painted label and black writing is fully visible, showing the stone's irregular outline and surface texture.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a small barrier
attribute_pattern: No regular pattern; surface shows natural mottling and a hand-painted label with alphanumeric text.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished, with minor chips and surface irregularities indicating moderate exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth, man-made surfaces but may blend with other natural stones or landscaping features.
